content: Pre-deploy audit via deployment_agent — identified 4 blockers (ML deps, OAuth hardcoding, .gitignore, DB_NAME)
Fix: hardcoded Google OAuth URLs → now dynamic (derived from request host, respects X-Forwarded-* headers)
Fix: cleared hardcoded preview URLs from backend/.env (kept as empty strings for dynamic resolution)
Fix: .gitignore verified — already covers test_credentials.md; added !deploy/.env.example exception
Deploy kit for Hetzner VPS + docker-compose: Dockerfile.backend (CPU torch, tini, model-cache volumes)
Deploy kit: Dockerfile.frontend (multi-stage CRA build, nginx runtime, SPA fallback)
Deploy kit: Caddyfile (auto-HTTPS via Let's Encrypt, /api/* → backend, /* → frontend, security headers)
Deploy kit: docker-compose.yml with health checks + model-cache volumes + 3 GB memory ceiling
Deploy kit: .env.example + DEPLOY.md (11-section step-by-step Hetzner guide: Atlas → Docker → DNS → boot → OAuth → PayPal → ops)
